device_name: ACR  LAB Urine Analysis Test System
intended_use: The ACR | LAB Urine Analysis Test System is comprised of a smartphone application, a proprietary Color-Board, and ACR Reagent Strips. It is intended for the semi-quantitative detection of albumin and
intended_use_full: The ACR | LAB Urine Analysis Test System is comprised of a smartphone application, a proprietary Color-Board, and ACR Reagent Strips. It is intended for the semi-quantitative detection of albumin and creatinine in urine, as well as the presentation of their ratio. The ACR | LAB Urine Analysis Test System is intended for in-vitro diagnostic use by a healthcare professional in a point of care setting. These results may be used in conjunction with clinical evaluation as an aid in the diagnosis for kidney function.
ground_truth: ACON Laboratories' Mission U120 Ultra Urine Analyzer (predicate device)
other_metrics: Repeatability: 100% exact match (189 tests); Reproducibility: 99.8% exact match (1,080 tests); Linearity: demonstrated linear relationship with no biases; Limit of Detection established for both analytes; Timing Flex Study conducted for dipping, blotting, assay time, and carry-over
